{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Field Engineer",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe. Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Field&nbsp;&nbsp;Engineer&nbsp;

Job Location: Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Key Responsibilities
Installation and Configuration:


	Attending to customer premises to install and configure ISP services, including internet connectivity, routers, modems, and other networking equipment.
	Follow installation guidelines, technical specifications, and company procedures to ensure accurate setup and connectivity.
	Test and verify the performance of installed services to ensure they meet the desired speed, reliability, and quality standards.
	Educate customers on the proper use and maintenance of the installed equipment and services.


Troubleshooting and Issue Resolution:


	Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to network connectivity, equipment malfunction, or service disruptions.
	Respond to customer complaints or service requests in a timely manner and provide effective solutions to address their concerns.


Field Engineer &ndash; Job Description V.3.0


	Collaborate with internal teams, such as coordinators, network operations and support, to escalate and resolve complex issues when necessary.
	Maintain detailed documentation of customer interactions, service requests, and problem resolutions.


Customer Service and Communication:


	Interact professionally and courteously with customers, ensuring a positive customer experience during the installation process.
	Communicate technical information to customers in a clear and understandable manner, addressing any questions or concerns they may have.
	Provide recommendations for improving network performance, equipment upgrades, or additional services based on customer requirements and industry best practices.
	Collaborate with sales teams or account managers to gather customer feedback and identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling services.


Quality Assurance and Compliance:


	Ensure installations are completed according to company standards, policies, and regulatory requirements.
	Perform regular audits and quality checks on installed services to identify any deficiencies and implement corrective actions.
	Stay updated with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices related to ISP installations to enhance service delivery and customer satisfaction.


Qualification and Skills


	High school diploma or equivalent; technical certifications or degree in a related field is a plus.
	Proven experience in network installations, preferably within an ISP or telecommunications environment.
	Strong knowledge of networking concepts, protocols, and equipment, such as routers, switches, modems, and cabling.
	Proficiency in troubleshooting network connectivity issues and resolving technical problems.
	Familiarity with various operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS) and network diagnostic tools.
	Excellent communication and customer service skills to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
	Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a field environment.
	Valid driver&#39;s license and willingness to travel to customer sites as required.
	Physical ability to lift and move networking equipment during installations.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@cobranet.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;

Note: Only qualiifed candidates will be shortlisted.&nbsp;",

  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",

Field Engineer Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe. Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Field  Engineer 

Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time
     

            
    



Key Responsibilities
Installation and Configuration:


	Attending to customer premises to install and configure ISP services, including internet connectivity, routers, modems, and other networking equipment.
	Follow installation guidelines, technical specifications, and company procedures to ensure accurate setup and connectivity.
	Test and verify the performance of installed services to ensure they meet the desired speed, reliability, and quality standards.
	Educate customers on the proper use and maintenance of the installed equipment and services.


Troubleshooting and Issue Resolution:


	Diagnose and resolve technical issues related to network connectivity, equipment malfunction, or service disruptions.
	Respond to customer complaints or service requests in a timely manner and provide effective solutions to address their concerns.


Field Engineer – Job Description V.3.0


	Collaborate with internal teams, such as coordinators, network operations and support, to escalate and resolve complex issues when necessary.
	Maintain detailed documentation of customer interactions, service requests, and problem resolutions.


Customer Service and Communication:


	Interact professionally and courteously with customers, ensuring a positive customer experience during the installation process.
	Communicate technical information to customers in a clear and understandable manner, addressing any questions or concerns they may have.
	Provide recommendations for improving network performance, equipment upgrades, or additional services based on customer requirements and industry best practices.
	Collaborate with sales teams or account managers to gather customer feedback and identify opportunities for upselling or cross-selling services.


Quality Assurance and Compliance:


	Ensure installations are completed according to company standards, policies, and regulatory requirements.
	Perform regular audits and quality checks on installed services to identify any deficiencies and implement corrective actions.
	Stay updated with industry trends, emerging technologies, and best practices related to ISP installations to enhance service delivery and customer satisfaction.


Qualification and Skills


	High school diploma or equivalent; technical certifications or degree in a related field is a plus.
	Proven experience in network installations, preferably within an ISP or telecommunications environment.
	Strong knowledge of networking concepts, protocols, and equipment, such as routers, switches, modems, and cabling.
	Proficiency in troubleshooting network connectivity issues and resolving technical problems.
	Familiarity with various operating systems (Windows, Linux, macOS) and network diagnostic tools.
	Excellent communication and customer service skills to interact effectively with customers and internal teams.
	Ability to work independently, prioritize tasks, and meet deadlines in a field environment.
	Valid driver's license and willingness to travel to customer sites as required.
	Physical ability to lift and move networking equipment during installations.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email. 

Note: Only qualiifed candidates will be shortlisted.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Accountant",
  "description": "Talent City - Our client is a leading conglomerate operating in the Fintech, Oil and Gas, Technology, and Media, renowned for its commitment to excellence, innovation, and inclusive growth.

&nbsp;They are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: Head of Accounts

Job Overview


	As an Accountant, you will be responsible for managing day-to-day accounting operations, ensuring accurate financial records, compliance with statutory requirements, and timely reporting.
	The role supports financial planning, controls, and decision-making by maintaining integrity in financial data and contributing to efficient financial processes.


Key Responsibilities
Financial Accounting &amp; Reporting:


	Prepare and maintain accurate general ledger entries in line with accounting standards.
	Ensure timely preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Perform month-end and year-end closing activities, including accruals and adjustments.
	Prepare management accounts and variance analysis to support business decisions.
	Maintain proper documentation and audit trails for all financial transactions.


Accounts Payable &amp; Receivable:


	Process supplier invoices, verify accuracy, and ensure timely payments.
	Manage accounts receivable, issue invoices, monitor collections, and follow up on outstanding balances.
	Reconcile vendor and customer accounts regularly.
	Ensure proper approval and documentation for all payments and receipts.


Banking &amp; Reconciliations:


	Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations.
	Monitor cash flow and ensure adequate liquidity for operations.
	Liaise with banks on transactions, documentation, and account management.
	Investigate and resolve reconciliation discrepancies promptly.


Taxation &amp; Statutory Compliance:


	Prepare and remit statutory deductions including VAT, WHT, PAYE, and other applicable taxes.
	Ensure compliance with relevant tax laws and regulatory requirements.
	Support tax audits and respond to queries from tax authorities.
	Maintain up-to-date records for statutory filings and compliance.


Budgeting &amp; Financial Control:


	Support the budgeting and forecasting process.
	Track actual performance against budgets and investigate variances.
	Ensure adherence to internal controls, financial policies, and procedures.
	Identify process improvement opportunities to enhance efficiency and cost control.


Audit &amp; Risk&nbsp;&nbsp;Management:


	Support internal and external audit processes by providing required documentation.
	Ensure compliance with audit recommendations and corrective actions.
	Assist in strengthening internal control systems to mitigate financial risks.


Collaboration &amp; Support:


	&nbsp;Work closely with other departments to ensure accurate financial data.
	Provide financial support and clarification to non-finance stakeholders.
	Assist in special projects and ad-hoc financial analysis as required.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	5-7 years of relative accounting experience.
	Professional qualification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is mandatory.
	Experience working with accounting/ERP software (e.g., Sage, SAP, Oracle, Zoho, or similar).
	Strong understanding of Nigerian tax laws and financial regulations.

Accountant Job at Talent City




        
    

        
        Talent City - Our client is a leading conglomerate operating in the Fintech, Oil and Gas, Technology, and Media, renowned for its commitment to excellence, innovation, and inclusive growth.

 They are  recruiting to fill the position below: 

Job Position: Accountant

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Reports to: Head of Accounts

Job Overview
     

            
    




	As an Accountant, you will be responsible for managing day-to-day accounting operations, ensuring accurate financial records, compliance with statutory requirements, and timely reporting.
	The role supports financial planning, controls, and decision-making by maintaining integrity in financial data and contributing to efficient financial processes.


Key Responsibilities
Financial Accounting & Reporting:


	Prepare and maintain accurate general ledger entries in line with accounting standards.
	Ensure timely preparation of monthly, quarterly, and annual financial statements.
	Perform month-end and year-end closing activities, including accruals and adjustments.
	Prepare management accounts and variance analysis to support business decisions.
	Maintain proper documentation and audit trails for all financial transactions.


Accounts Payable & Receivable:


	Process supplier invoices, verify accuracy, and ensure timely payments.
	Manage accounts receivable, issue invoices, monitor collections, and follow up on outstanding balances.
	Reconcile vendor and customer accounts regularly.
	Ensure proper approval and documentation for all payments and receipts.


Banking & Reconciliations:


	Perform daily and monthly bank reconciliations.
	Monitor cash flow and ensure adequate liquidity for operations.
	Liaise with banks on transactions, documentation, and account management.
	Investigate and resolve reconciliation discrepancies promptly.


Taxation & Statutory Compliance:


	Prepare and remit statutory deductions including VAT, WHT, PAYE, and other applicable taxes.
	Ensure compliance with relevant tax laws and regulatory requirements.
	Support tax audits and respond to queries from tax authorities.
	Maintain up-to-date records for statutory filings and compliance.


Budgeting & Financial Control:


	Support the budgeting and forecasting process.
	Track actual performance against budgets and investigate variances.
	Ensure adherence to internal controls, financial policies, and procedures.
	Identify process improvement opportunities to enhance efficiency and cost control.


Audit & Risk  Management:


	Support internal and external audit processes by providing required documentation.
	Ensure compliance with audit recommendations and corrective actions.
	Assist in strengthening internal control systems to mitigate financial risks.


Collaboration & Support:


	 Work closely with other departments to ensure accurate financial data.
	Provide financial support and clarification to non-finance stakeholders.
	Assist in special projects and ad-hoc financial analysis as required.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, Economics, or a related field.
	5-7 years of relative accounting experience.
	Professional qualification (ICAN, ACCA, or equivalent) is mandatory.
	Experience working with accounting/ERP software (e.g., Sage, SAP, Oracle, Zoho, or similar).
	Strong understanding of Nigerian tax laws and financial regulations.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fiber Optics Engineer",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Fiber Optics&nbsp;&nbsp;Engineer&nbsp;

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties and Responsibilities


	Responsible for customer premise installations, including racking, cabling, bonding and grounding.
	Coordinate fiber activities with other departments and the Manager of OSP construction
	Perform ring cuts on live fiber without affecting existing services.
	Perform fiber tests with OTDR&rsquo;s, light source and meters.
	Terminate, splice, bonds/grounds and tests fiber optic equipment to division standards.
	Provide accurate equipment location, splicing and terminating records for the fiber database.
	Assist Construction/Engineering departments in accepting and turning up the fiber network.
	Perform installation of fiber optic equipment and patch and panels.
	Monitor, communicate and perform corrective actions to fix problems affecting any fiber or fiber related equipment.
	Install demarcation enclosures and other telecom equipment.
	Must be well versed in modern fiber splicing techniques.
	OTDR, power meters, traffic identifiers, digital multimeters, cleavers, strippers, buffer tube splitters, cable ring tools, hand tools, toners, duct rodders, ladders, bucket trucks
	Ability to work under minimal supervision. And apply technical expertise to evaluate problems and implementing the best solutions.
	Work a variety of schedules including normal duty and on call duty.
	Will be required to work night shifts and overtime when needed.


Education and qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND in Electrical Electronic/Computer engineering or other related Course.
	3+ years of technical experience in a telecommunications or network operations environment.
	Independent problem solver combined with strong team orientation.
	Knowledgeable in cisco switching and routing configuration and troubleshooting
	Good understanding of telecommunication equipment operation
	Good experience of multi-vendor telecommunication equipment
	Age: More than 25 years old


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: recruitment@cobranet.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-07-11",
  "validThrough": "2026-08-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Cobranet Limited"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "201741"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",
    "currency": "NGN",
    "value": {
      "@type": "QuantitativeValue",
      "minValue": 0,
      "maxValue": 0,
      "unitText": "MONTH"
    }
  }
}



Fiber Optics Engineer Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.

Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Fiber Optics  Engineer 
     

            
    



Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Duties and Responsibilities


	Responsible for customer premise installations, including racking, cabling, bonding and grounding.
	Coordinate fiber activities with other departments and the Manager of OSP construction
	Perform ring cuts on live fiber without affecting existing services.
	Perform fiber tests with OTDR’s, light source and meters.
	Terminate, splice, bonds/grounds and tests fiber optic equipment to division standards.
	Provide accurate equipment location, splicing and terminating records for the fiber database.
	Assist Construction/Engineering departments in accepting and turning up the fiber network.
	Perform installation of fiber optic equipment and patch and panels.
	Monitor, communicate and perform corrective actions to fix problems affecting any fiber or fiber related equipment.
	Install demarcation enclosures and other telecom equipment.
	Must be well versed in modern fiber splicing techniques.
	OTDR, power meters, traffic identifiers, digital multimeters, cleavers, strippers, buffer tube splitters, cable ring tools, hand tools, toners, duct rodders, ladders, bucket trucks
	Ability to work under minimal supervision. And apply technical expertise to evaluate problems and implementing the best solutions.
	Work a variety of schedules including normal duty and on call duty.
	Will be required to work night shifts and overtime when needed.


Education and qualifications


	B.Sc Degree / HND in Electrical Electronic/Computer engineering or other related Course.
	3+ years of technical experience in a telecommunications or network operations environment.
	Independent problem solver combined with strong team orientation.
	Knowledgeable in cisco switching and routing configuration and troubleshooting
	Good understanding of telecommunication equipment operation
	Good experience of multi-vendor telecommunication equipment
	Age: More than 25 years old


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Maintenance Manager",
  "description": "UnoCasa&nbsp;&nbsp;Consulting - Our client in the&nbsp;&nbsp;Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) sector is recruiting to fill the position below:&nbsp;

&nbsp;Job Position: Maintenance Manager

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview

Maintenance Manager Job at UnoCasa Limited




        
    

        
        UnoCasa  Consulting - Our client in the  Engineering, Procurement, and Construction (EPC) sector is recruiting to fill the position below: 

 Job Position: Maintenance Manager

Job Location: Warri, Delta
Employment Type: Full-time

Overview


	We are seeking an experienced Maintenance Manager to oversee the maintenance, reliability, and performance of critical operational assets and heavy equipment.


Key Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Develop and implement preventive, predictive, and corrective maintenance programs.
	Plan and coordinate routine and emergency maintenance activities.
	Ensure maximum equipment uptime, reliability, and operational efficiency.
	Oversee maintenance of heavy equipment, pipelines, cranes, trenchless technology rigs, and auxiliary machinery.
	Conduct inspections, diagnostics, troubleshooting, and performance evaluations.
	Manage equipment lifecycle, upgrades, and replacement planning.
	Coordinate spare parts and consumables procurement.
	Ensure compliance with HSE policies, industry regulations, and maintenance standards.
	Develop and enforce maintenance SOPs, conduct risk assessments, and maintain accurate maintenance records.
	Lead, supervise, and develop maintenance engineers, technicians, and contractors.
	Manage maintenance budgets, monitor costs, and drive continuous improvement initiatives.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Equipment Availability Rate of 95%+ uptime
	Reduction in Mean Time to Repair (MTTR)
	Improvement in Mean Time Between Failures (MTBF)
	100% HSE compliance
	Maintenance cost optimization
	Increased planned maintenance ratio.


Requirements & Education


	Bachelor's Degree in Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
	8–10 years of maintenance experience in EPC, construction, oil & gas, manufacturing, or heavy industrial environments.
	Minimum of 3–5 years in a maintenance leadership or managerial role.
	Proven experience managing heavy-duty construction and industrial equipment.
	Strong knowledge of CMMS, Reliability-Centered Maintenance (RCM), and Root Cause Analysis (RCA).
	Solid understanding of mechanical, hydraulic, pneumatic, and electrical systems.
	Expertise in maintenance planning, asset management, equipment reliability, troubleshooting, and diagnostics.
	Strong leadership, communication, stakeholder management, analytical, and problem-solving abilities.
	Safety-focused, proactive, and detail-oriented approach.
